title: COSY HOMEER Large Indoor Doormat 80x120cm, Nonslip TPR Backing Indoor Floor Mat for Inside Door Entrance Entryway, Polypropylene Washable Back Door Mat Dirt Trapper Area Rugs, Grey
features: Polypropylene Entrance Doormats: COSY HOMEER door mat is made of premium polypropylene material and extremely dense yarns, which is super absorbent and dirt-repellent. Harder than normal soft fabric mats. The indoor entrance doormat can carry stains and water on your shoes to keep your home fresh and clean

Low Profile: Featured 1 cm thickness and reinforced overlock edges, which can ensure the door won't get stuck when you open and close door the rug won't go curling. Please measure the distance between your door to the floor. Entrance mat can not be too thin or lightweight in busy traffic area.Or it will get a mess when you enter the door

Non-Slip TPR Backing: Unlike normal rugs used tapes to be stuck to the floor, COSY HOMEER door mat back is fully covered with premium TPR material. Provides the greatest anti-slip performance without damage of floor surface. Whether it is pets or people passing through the doormat, the doormat edge does not roll up or curl and will not cause displacement

Easy to Clean: As a high frequency of daily use of the entrance door mat, convenient daily cleaning is very necessary. Just use a vacuum or shake it off. The floor mat produced by a special tufting process is very strong. For deeper cleaning, please laundry with cold water and mild detergent, do not use the dryer

Widely Used: The indoor door mat can be widely used everywhere in your house, work as room entrance mat, resistant-stain mat, indoor welcome mat, kitchen rug and entryway mat. Different sizes and colors are available. Start decorate your home!
